rulings.Case Title: MARTIN RYAN VS. 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder, And Joinder, In Motion By Pacific Union International Inc And Joanne Stein'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 01, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT DIANE WILEY Joinder, And Joinder, In Motion By Pacific Union International Inc And Joanne Stein'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Fourth Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice and untimely. Joinder filed on November 19, 2020 for December 1, 2020 hearing. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN RYAN VS. 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer By Defendants Pacific Union International, Inc. And Joanne Stein To Plaintiffs Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 01, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL, INC., JOANNE STEIN Demurrer By Defendants Pacific Union International, Inc. And Joanne Stein To Plaintiffs Fourth Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the cause of action for negligence misrepresentation. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN RYAN VS. 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ET AL

rulings.Case Title: CONSOLIDATED PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. ALYSSA MUELLER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 01, 2020 line 7. DEFENDANT ALYSSA MUELLER DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Complaint further sufficiently alleges Plaintiff's standing to sue. Factual disputes may not be properly addressed on Demurrer. Objections to Request for Judicial Notice are sustained. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THORSTEN GERNOTH ET AL VS. DENHI DONIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 01, 2020 line 8. DEFENDANT DENHI DONIS MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS Defendant Donis Motion to Quash Service of Summons and Complaint. Hearing Required. Process server and Mr. Donis to be present. For Zoom appearances counsel to e-mail Deparment501ContestTR@sftc.org no later than 5:00 p.m. on November 30, 2020 for a link. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARGUERITTA WOUAWAD ET AL VS. SCOTT MOLLENKOPF ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 01, 2020 line 9. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER LLOYD DEMURRER to COMPLAINT Defendant Lloyd's Demurrer to Complaint. Hearing Required for Plaintiff to address whether Plaintiff could allege in good faith that a notification of claim of extension was provided to the Rent Board within 30 days of being made by the tenant and whether notification of new withdrawal date was provided within 90 days of Notice of Intent to Withdraw. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 1, 2020 line 11.
